results.question: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "Date"."Fiscal Year" AS FiscalYear, SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue, SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS total_cost, SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") - SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, (SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") - SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") * 100 AS gross_margin_pct, COUNT("Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_order_lines FROM "Date" JOIN "Sales" ON "Date"."DateKey" = "Sales"."OrderDateKey" GROUP BY "Date"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "Date"."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT p."Category", SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100.0 / SUM(SUM(s."Sales Amount")) OVER () AS "revenue_share_pct", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "gross_margin_pct" FROM "Sales" AS JOIN "Product" AS ON "Product"."ProductKey" = "Sales"."ProductKey" GROUP BY p."Category" ORDER BY "Sales Amount" DESC
results.error:

results.question: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
results.sql: SELECT "Product", "Category", "Subcategory", SUM("Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit", (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey" GROUP BY "Product", "Category", "Subcategory" ORDER BY "Sales Amount" DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: Show revenue and units sold broken down by territory group, country, region, and fiscal year. Return columns: Group, Country, Region, Fiscal Year, revenue, units_sold. Sort by Group, Country, Region, then Fiscal Year all ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "Sales_Territory"."Group" AS "Group", "Sales_Territory"."Country" AS "Country", "Sales_Territory"."Region" AS "Region", "Date"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year", SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS "revenue", SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold" FROM "Sales" INNER JOIN "Sales_Territory" ON "Sales"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "Sales_Territory"."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey" GROUP BY "Sales_Territory"."Group", "Sales_Territory"."Country", "Sales_Territory"."Region", "Date"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "Sales_Territory"."Group" ASC, "Sales_Territory"."Country" ASC, "Sales_Territory"."Region" ASC, "Date"."Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql: SELECT "Customer"."Customer" AS "Customer", "Customer"."City" AS "City", "Customer"."State-Province" AS "State-Province", "Customer"."Country-Region" AS "Country-Region", COUNT(*) AS "total_orders", COUNT("Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS "total_line_items", SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS "total_units", SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS "lifetime_revenue", SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") - SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS "lifetime_profit" FROM "Customer" INNER JOIN "Sales" ON "Customer"."CustomerKey" = "Sales"."CustomerKey" WHERE "Customer"."CustomerKey" != -1 GROUP BY "Customer"."Customer", "Customer"."City", "Customer"."State-Province", "Customer"."Country-Region" ORDER BY "Customer"."Customer" DESC LIMIT 15

results.question: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "Month", "MonthKey", SUM("Sales Amount") AS "monthly_revenue", COUNT(DISTINCT "SalesOrderLineKey") AS "orders", SUM("Order Quantity") AS "units_sold" FROM "Sales" JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey" GROUP BY "Month", "MonthKey" ORDER BY "MonthKey" ASC

results.question: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. results.question: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
results.sql: SELECT "Country-Region", COUNT(*) AS "reseller_count", COUNT(DISTINCT "Business Type") AS "business_type_count", COUNT(DISTINCT "State-Province") AS "state_count" FROM "Reseller" GROUP BY "Country-Region" ORDER BY "Country-Region" DESC

results.question: List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Category" AS "Category" FROM "Product" ORDER BY "Category" ASC

results.question: List all distinct product colors. Return columns: Color. Sort by Color ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Color" FROM "Product" ORDER BY "Color" ASC

results.question: List all sales territory regions and their countries. Return columns: Region, Country. Sort by Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT "Region", "Country" FROM "Sales_Territory" ORDER BY "Region" ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal years. Return columns: Fiscal Year. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Year" FROM "Date" ORDER BY "Fiscal Year" ASC

results.question: List all distinct sales channels. Return columns: Channel. Sort by Channel ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Channel" AS "Channel" FROM "Sales_Order" ORDER BY "Channel" ASC

results.question: List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Country-Region" FROM "Customer" ORDER BY "Country-Region" ASC

results.question: List all distinct reseller business types. Return columns: Business Type. Sort by Business Type ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Business Type" FROM "Reseller" ORDER BY "Business Type" ASC

results.question: List all distinct fiscal quarters. Return columns: Fiscal Quarter. Sort by Fiscal Quarter ascending.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Fiscal Quarter" FROM "Date" ORDER BY "Fiscal Quarter" ASC
